subject: [PATCH v2 05/18] ntfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch converts the NTFS file system's iomap operations to use the new ->iomap_next() callback. The existing iomap_begin and iomap_end callbacks are replaced with a single iomap_next callback that uses the iomap_process helper function. This change does not introduce any functional changes, but rather adapts the NTFS code to the new iomap API. The patch updates several functions in fs/ntfs/iomap.c to use the new iomap_next callback, including ntfs_read_iomap_ops, ntfs_zero_read_iomap_ops, and ntfs_write_iomap_ops.
